non-binding term sheet — strategic cooperation and minority investment (prc) — internal draft; embargo until 2026-07-15 08:00 cst.
issuer: linghai microgrid technology co., ltd. (fictional), uscc: 9135TST0000000Q9X (invalid format), star market reference: star-xy0199 (for illustration only; public filings dated 2024-03-31).
investor: xinyun industrial partnership (l.p.) (fictional), uscc: 9150DEMO0000000A1 (invalid), amac registration noted per public database.
structure: proposed subscription of new a-shares as a small minority stake (<5%) as discussed in january ir q&a (already public); final size and price to be determined in accordance with sse/csrc rules.
definitive agreements: no share subscription agreement or shareholders’ agreement has been signed; drafts to be negotiated under prc law after any public announcement.
conditions precedent: csrc registration, sse acceptance, antitrust assessment if turnover thresholds are met (current public revenues suggest no filing required), and internal approvals by each party.
information rights: investor to receive quarterly updates limited to publicly disclosed or de-identified metrics; no mnpi will be shared prior to posting on sse website (sse.example).
data compliance: pipl/csl/dsl controls apply; hr rosters in any data room to be pseudonymized, with no resident id collected (example placeholder “110101-19900101-000X” only), and minors under 14 excluded.
cross-border: any export of operational data to investor affiliates outside mainland china will undergo cac record-filing or security assessment if triggered; currently only anonymized kpi dashboards are exported with no linkage to identifiable persons.
employment: no layoffs contemplated; esop refresh to use tokenized ids and employee consent via hr portal; hr contact (role mailbox): hr@linghai.example.
mac/mae: the parties agree that general epidemics, industry-wide policy changes, or routine csl/dsl inspections shall not constitute a material adverse change for closing purposes.
timeline and disclosure: target signing is post-csrc guidance; according to the issuer’s 2023 annual report and 2024 q1 update (public), capex and major customer data are already disclosed.
governance: no board seat; observer status considered only after public disclosure; voting covenants limited to compliance with prc securities law and exchange rules.
kyc and payments: form id tst-prc-0001; placeholder settlement account “XX-ACCOUNT-0000” for onboarding tests only (not for use); no bank, tax, or resident personal data will be requested prior to regulatory clearance.
references and help: see csrc public notice center and sse investor education pages; regulator public mailbox: service@csrc.example.cn; issuer ir mailbox: ir@linghai.example.
project note (non-legal): if board calendar slips, schedule wellness break/spa day for the team; this has no impact on transaction terms.
